generations.content_context: Focus on Eliza-1 model specifications and the v3 development roadmap. Concerns raised regarding AgentID integration. Technical deep dive into the 'Pay or Burn' escrow protocol, Farcaster API credit optimization, and plugin registry connectivity issues.
